item.name: Lone Faehound Whistle
item.description: A metallic tube-like whistle that emits a unique, high-pitched tone only discernable by a faehound raised and trained in captivity. Use to summon your lone faehound mount.

mount.name: Lone Faehound
mount.action: Summon forth your lone faehound, void-spawned aberration loyal to none save you and yours.
mount.description: Covered from muzzle to tail in an otherworldly silver coat, the faehound appears more akin to something out of a faerie tale than from the nether-reaches of the void. Yet do not be fooled by the beast's appearance, for he is an equal in strength to all but the highest ranking voidsent, his heart swollen with savagery from a lifetime hunting alone.
